name: api-doc-parser
description: Parse OpenAPI 3.x / Swagger 2.0 API documentation by module (tag), extract endpoint details, and output Markdown + structured JSON. v2 introduces a sub-skill architecture (doc-fetch, doc-list, doc-parse, doc-help) with fine-grained slash commands, supports 9 platforms (Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, Qoder, OpenCode, Trae, Kiwi, Gemini CLI, Copilot CLI), and offers 3 installation methods (plugin, NPM, manual). Built-in context overflow protection via jq pipelines.
author: summer-bwbb
